subject: Geography
title: Mammoth Cave
description: A quick, practical guide to Mammoth Cave.

hook.text: Mammoth Cave in Kentucky is the longest known cave system on Earth—over 680 km explored.

buildup.text: Native Americans explored its passages 4,000 years ago by torchlight.

discovery.text: New passages are still being discovered. The cave may be over 1,600 km long in total.

twist.text: During the War of 1812, miners extracted saltpeter from the cave to make gunpowder.

climax.text: Mammoth Cave is so vast that it has its own weather systems and unique species.

punchline.text: The world's longest cave keeps getting longer every time we look.

quiz.question: How long is the explored portion of Mammoth Cave?
